title: Smoky Crisp Tunisian Cilantro Tagine
description: A flavorful and refreshing Tunisian dish featuring cilantro leaves, featuring smoky notes from preserved lemons and crisp texture from toasted almonds.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until it's translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the diced preserved lemon, chopped cilantro, ground cumin, ground coriander, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute, until the mixture is fragrant.
Add the chopped almonds and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly, until they're lightly toasted.
Add the chicken broth and water to the saucepan. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Serve the Smoky Crisp Tunisian Cilantro Tagine hot, garnished with additional chopped cilantro if desired.
